name: Ledtech Electronics Corp.
summary: Ledtech Electronics Corp. produces and sells LED lamps and displays in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers PLCC and high power lighting class components; light modules/engines; flexible and rigid light strips; and standard, super bright, super flux, and bi-color lamps, as well as IR/PT lamps and light sensors. It also provides single digit, dual digit, three digit, four digit, alphanumeric, dot matrix, intelligent, light bar, bar array, and SMT displays; top view, chip LED, right angle, and UVA/UVC SMD products, as well as axial LED products with plastic holders; and backlights. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
